name: @cvoya/spring-connector-github-web
description: Web UI for the GitHub connector. Consumed as a workspace sibling by Cvoya.Spring.Web so the .NET connector package can own both its server-side and web surfaces. This package declares no dependencies on its own: everything (react, lucide-react, the shared @/* components) is hoisted from the host web app. See src/Cvoya.Spring.Web/next.config.ts (turbopack.root) and tsconfig.json (@connector-github path alias) for how the two halves meet.
